evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Peer-review and provide feedback on the work of other analysts to maintain high standards.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals (version control, peer review, governance, high standards) dominate with no explicit speed/shipping language present.
evidence.domain_risk: Deliver advanced analyses and insights that drive product, growth, and commercial strategy decisions.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Airline commercial strategy decisions affect business outcomes but no financial reporting, regulatory, or safety-compliance language is present in the JD.
evidence.collaboration_width: Commercial; Central Data Engineering; BI; Product
evidence.data_team_maturity: Collaborate with BI, Data Engineering, and Product to maintain robust pipelines and models.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A named Central Data Engineering team, distinct BI and Product functions, and established governance/mentoring practices indicate a mature, specialised data organisation.
evidence.jd_authorship: Demonstrated experience designing and deploying production-grade agentic AI workflows.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific architectural terms (gold-layer data assets, Snowflake, Fivetran/dbt, agentic AI workflows) give a precise, concrete picture of the role.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Design and deploy next-generation BI and analytics tools that give Commercial teams direct, confident self-serve access to data.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Commercial teams and commercial strategy decisions are the named primary audience and framing throughout responsibilities.
evidence.autonomy_level: Identify and communicate strategic opportunities where data can unlock business value.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Explicit strategic-opportunity-identification language, combined with mentoring and peer-review authority, indicates a direction-setting rather than purely scoped-execution role.
evidence.ai_role: Demonstrated experience designing and deploying production-grade agentic AI workflows.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected to build production AI workflow infrastructure that the business runs on, making AI downstream of the candidate's engineering output.
evidence.testing_framing: Implement version control practices and monitor for pipeline or data issues.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Monitoring, version control, and governance practices are named as owned responsibilities with explicit ownership verbs, not just tools in a requirements list.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Document workflows, ensure metric consistency, and promote best data governance practices.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Pipeline monitoring and governance are a stated operational concern, but the JD does not raise regulatory, compliance, or external stakeholder-trust framing.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design and build gold-layer data assets and semantic features that power self-service business reporting.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role mixes designing new gold-layer assets and next-generation BI tools with maintaining robust existing pipelines and models.
evidence.loss_aversion: Document workflows, ensure metric consistency, and promote best data governance practices. — reflects concern for pipeline/data reliability rather than regulatory or compliance risk.
